_meta.description: Q4 catalogue of ~24 toggle-able anti-trace anonymisation elements from sprints L+M+F. Each element maps an Engine pipeline step to its /v1/raw-smtp-test toggle flag. Used as single source of truth for dimensional sprint ordering.

elements.name: message_id_anonymization
elements.description: D5 sanitizeHeaders anonymises Message-ID to <16hex@senderFQDN>, removing engine.seznam.cz autodetect fingerprint.
elements.notes: Sprint I1 A/B confirmed. engine_messageid=true mirrors Engine HMAC dot-nanos format.

elements.name: xmailer_header
elements.description: X-Mailer: Seznam.cz header forged by humanize/fingerprint.go, stripped by relay D5 stripPrivacyHeaders.
elements.notes: Sprint L4 = allow. relay D5 strips in production; diagnostic injects it BEFORE strip to A/B recipient reaction.

elements.name: content_language_cs
elements.description: Content-Language: cs added by services/campaigns/content/template.go for every render.
elements.notes: Sprint L4 = allow.

elements.name: engine_from_displayname
elements.description: From: header uses algorithmically-derived display name (titleCase of local part). Mirrors services/campaigns/sender/headers.go BuildFromHeader.
elements.notes: Sprint L4 = allow. J3 flagged as fingerprint-at-scale risk.

elements.name: date_prague_tz
elements.description: Date header formatted in Europe/Prague local time (RFC1123Z with +0100/+0200 offset) instead of UTC (+0000). Engine always emits Prague time. UTC would signal automated sender.
elements.notes: Sprint F added. false=UTC (zero value default), true=Prague. Wire-MIME carries +0100 or +0200.

elements.name: received_chain_strip
elements.description: Relay D5 stripPrivacyHeaders removes Received: routing headers. High anonymity value: Received chain leaks relay routing path. Risk: some MTA reject mail without Received header.
elements.notes: Sprint F added. Flag injects synthetic Received: BEFORE relay path to verify strip fires. Direct path test verifies injection; relay path test verifies strip.

elements.name: user_agent_strip
elements.description: Relay D5 stripPrivacyHeaders removes User-Agent header. If relay sets User-Agent: Go-http-client/1.1, Seznam ML can detect non-human client. High anonymity value.
elements.notes: Sprint F added. Same inject-then-strip test pattern as H6.

elements.name: rfc2047_subject_encoding
elements.description: Subject header encoded as RFC 2047 base64 =?UTF-8?B?...?= instead of raw UTF-8. relay BuildMessage encodeSubject already does this for non-ASCII. Test: raw UTF-8 vs RFC2047 encoding effect on Seznam.
elements.notes: Sprint F added. RFC compliance test not anonymity test.

elements.name: tone_greeting
elements.description: Tone greeting prepend: 'Dobry den,\n\n'. Mirrors services/common/humanize/tone.go GreetingForStep.
elements.notes: Sprint M4 = allow.

elements.name: tone_closing
elements.description: Tone closing append: '\n\nS pozdravem,'. Mirrors services/common/humanize/tone.go ClosingForStep.
elements.notes: Sprint M4 = allow.

elements.name: signature_block
elements.description: B2B-style signature block append (name, role, phone, domain). Mirrors services/common/humanize/signature.go. Diagnostic uses one static fixture for determinism.
elements.notes: Sprint M4 = allow. Privacy note: signature contains sender identity (deanonymising element).

elements.name: restore_diacritics
elements.description: RestoreDiacritics canonical CZ word fix (~125 words). Mirrors humanize/engine.go post-imperfection restore pass.
elements.notes: Sprint M4 = allow.

elements.name: humanize_light
elements.description: Typography char-level substitutions: ~30% NBSP, em-dash, curly quotes. SAFE profile (no diacritics degradation).
elements.notes: Sprint I3 + L4 = allow.

elements.name: diacritics_degrade_subject
elements.description: Imperfect diacritics degrade in subject (40% keepProb). H1 hypothesis: stochastic mid-word ASCII mix is classic machine-spam fingerprint.
elements.notes: Sprint I4 = expected fail. Reason for PR #710 SAFE profile.

elements.name: diacritics_degrade_body
elements.description: Imperfect diacritics degrade in body (70%->40% descent). Same fingerprint risk as C6.
elements.notes: Sprint I4 = expected fail. PR #710 disabled via HUMANIZE_DIACRITICS_DEGRADE=false.

elements.name: typo_injection
elements.description: Imperfect typo injection: 0-3 random commas or periods inserted at word boundaries. Deterministic via TYPO_INJECT_TEST_SEED. Applied after diacritics transforms.
elements.notes: Sprint F added. New element not yet in Engine production path.

elements.name: bump_forward_wrap
elements.description: Reply-style forward quote wrap: 'Re: <subject>\n\n> <original body>'. Applied before humanize_light when both flags enabled so framing participates in typography substitutions.
elements.notes: Sprint F added. Pipeline position: after VoiceProfileVariation, before TypoInjection. C9 MUST come before humanize_light if both enabled.

elements.name: voice_profile_variation
elements.description: Voice: VARIANT_X annotation prepended to body (X in {A,B,C} deterministic from SHA-256(senderFromAddr) mod 3). Tests per-sender body shape variation detection.
elements.notes: Sprint F added. Pipeline position: after diacritics transforms, before BumpForwardWrap.

elements.name: multipart
elements.description: multipart/alternative wrap (text/plain + text/html). RFC 2046 least-rich-first part order.
elements.notes: Sprint M4 = allow.

elements.name: plain_to_html_minimal
elements.description:
Minimal HTML wrap:

...

. Fallback when EngineHTMLWrap=false.
elements.notes: Sprint L4 = allow. Controlled by multipart=true + engine_html_wrap=false.

elements.name: engine_html_wrap
elements.description:
Fingerprint engine HTML wrap:
...
.
elements.notes: Sprint L4 = allow. J3 Stage 1 candidate killer #2: Arial/14px explicit may look engineered.

elements.name: spans_inject
elements.description: Per-line span injection (30% prob): ... where N in {13,14,15}. Mirrors fingerprint.go:67-76.
elements.notes: Sprint L4 = allow (mixed). H1 ranks HIGH suspicion but no confirmed kill.

elements.name: redundant_divs
elements.description:
Redundant
 
injection after empty lines (20% prob). Mirrors fingerprint.go:79-81.
elements.notes: Sprint L4 = allow. J3 Stage 1 candidate #5: orphan div not standard Outlook/Gmail output.

elements.name: header_order
elements.description: Controls wire-MIME header emission order. Modes: default (Date->Message-ID->MIME-Version->X-Mailer->custom), reverse, alphabetical. Tests if header ordering is a spam signal.
elements.notes: Sprint F added. String enum field. Empty/omitted = default.

elements.name: boundary_format
elements.description: Multipart boundary string format. Modes: default (----=_Part_<32hex>), uuid (<UUID v4>), nextpart (_NextPart_<32hex>), mimepart (_mimepart_<32hex>). Only effective when multipart=true.
elements.notes: Sprint F added. String enum field. Anonymity: low (randomly generated). Boundary format is a client fingerprint.

elements.name: content_transfer_encoding_8bit
elements.description: Content-Transfer-Encoding for plain-text body part. false (default) = 8bit (existing behavior). true = quoted-printable encoding. Only effective for Multipart=false plain-text messages.
elements.notes: Sprint F added. Flag polarity inverted: false=8bit (zero-value backward-compat), true=QP. Sprint L4 confirmed 8bit=allow. QP compliance test only.
